item.title: The Trump family’s crypto portfolio is getting battered with the rest of the industry—but Melania’s memecoin has fared surprisingly well
item.description: A recent collapse in the price of Bitcoin has spurred weakness across the sector.

item.title: Jennifer Garner’s Once Upon a Farm IPO jumps 40% as the company raises $198 million
item.description: Once Upon a Farm started trading on the New York Stock Exchange Friday.

item.title: ‘Every fight I have ever been in, I’ve won’: British PM Starmer vows to fight for his job after Epstein links sack cabinet
item.description: Starmer apologized to Epstein's victims last week and said he was sorry for “having believed Mandelson’s lies.”

item.title: The man who fixed Walmart’s grocery business was just appointed CEO of Kroger
item.description: Former Walmart U.S. chief Greg Foran is just the direct, no-nonsense CEO the supermarket chain urgently needs.

item.title: Scott Galloway on why that Anthropic Super Bowl ad got under Sam Altman’s skin and exposed ‘therapy’ as the AI use case
item.description: The marketing guru and host of Prof G Markets said the ad was a “seminal moment” in the AI wars and will lead to Anthropic being more valuable than Op...
